hero.title: Software Developer & IT Trainer
hero.description: Master's Research student — Intelligent Information Systems. Passionate about mobile development, web and Artificial Intelligence.

about.title: About me
about.subtitle: Who am I?
about.heading: Passionate Developer & IT Trainer
about.p1: Master 1 Research student in Intelligent Information Systems at ISIGK, holder of a Software Engineering degree (2025). I combine technical expertise and pedagogy to create innovative solutions.
about.p2: Experienced in mobile development (React Native) and web (React), with a specialization in Supabase backends and clean architectures. IT trainer for children and high school students.
about.p3: Motivated, adaptable, able to work under pressure within dynamic teams.

projects.title: My Projects
projects.subtitle: What I have built
projects.smah_subtitle: Explainable Hybrid Multi-Agent System for Intelligent Study Planning
projects.smah_desc: Master research project — Explainable Hybrid Multi-Agent System (HMAS) for intelligent study planning. Combines a classic ML agent and a Neuro-Symbolic agent with an aggregation module.
projects.hydra_desc: Intelligent mobile app that calculates and adapts daily water intake recommendations based on physiological profile, real-time physical activity and medical conditions.
projects.nebzo_desc: Full-stack restaurant management system — web admin dashboard and staff mobile app. Real-time orders, QR digital menu, employee management.
projects.portfolio_desc: Personal portfolio built with React, designed and coded from scratch. Modern design, responsive, deployed on GitHub Pages.
